MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant RPI Company's motion to compel Plaintiff Jesse Hall to appear and testify at deposition is off calendar at the moving party's request. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)

DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-19-2014 Continued To Aug-28-14 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 503

Motion And Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff Jesse J. Hall To Appear And Testify At Deposition
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Continued To Jul-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Arturo E. Sandoval and Abigail P. Adams of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), appearing for defendant / moving party RPI Company
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Jesse J. Hall

RULING:
DEFENDANT RPI COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING PLAINTIFF JESSE J. HALL TO APPEAR AND TESTIFY AT DEPOSITION

Parties stipulated that the argument in RPI's same motion to compel in the Lawrence case (#276131) would apply to this motion. Hearing held. The Court ordered continued Defendant RPI Company's motion to compel Plaintiff Jesse Hall to appear and testify at deposition to July 16, 2014 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503. Defendant's supplemental briefing due by 7/7 and plaintiff's supplemental reply due by 7/10. Both briefs are not to exceed 5 pages. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Sandy Lee of AIKEN WELCH, CSR 971 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)

Motion And Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff Jesse J. Hall To Appear And Testify At Deposition
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Continued To Jun-17-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant RPI Company's motion to compel plaintiff to appear and testify at deposition is continued on the court's own motion to June 17, 2014 due to the court's schedule. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
